# PaperKnife vVERSION Release

## Visuals & User Interface
- Upgraded PDF engine and framework dependencies.
- Restored compile SDK version to Android 36 for complete compatibility.
- Fixed the blank page landing and asset path issues on deployed web version.

---

## 📦 APK Version Comparison

| Feature | Full Version (paperknife-vVERSION.apk) | Lite Version (paperknife-lite-vVERSION.apk) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Target** | GitHub / Direct Install | F-Droid / IzzyOnDroid |
| **File Size** | ~20 MB | ~5 MB |
| **Offline OCR** | Included | Excluded |

---

> **Privacy**: No data ever leaves your device. No analytics. No servers. Raw local processing.
